query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A predominantly black image containing a few sparse, tiny specks of blue, purple, and white light scattered across the dark field.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An image defined by extreme underexposure and a near-total absence of visible detail, where the frame is crushed to almost pure blackness and only a few tiny, isolated specks of blue, purple, and white light are visible scattered in the darkness.
